calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-24-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lance Russun appeared by zoom for Zaida Owre (petitioner/executor).

Discussion was held regarding the appropriate manner in which the remaining 10% is to be distributed amongst the groups of beneficiaries, whether the newly identified great-grandchildren should be considered "issue" under the terms of the will, the testator's intent, whether the proposed distribution reflects a proper reading of the will, etc. Reference is made to the order determining entitlement to distribution of lapsed share filed August 27, 2021. The Amended First and Final Account and Report of Personal Representative, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: L. Maloney. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Beneficiary'S Lapsed Share
Off Calendar Aug-27-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Diana Redding appeared by zoom for Zaida Morena Owre.

Ms. Redding stated that this was a poorly written will and that they weren't able to contact the drafting attorney to confirm the decedent's intent. Ms. Redding also stated that they have this 10% that was supposed to go to this church when the decedent passed away, but they got a health care directive showing that the decedent wasn't a member of any church, and that the sole heir of the decedent is an adult sister and they are asking that the 10% instead be distributed to Emilia (Sister) as the sole intestate heir. The Court stated that it doesn't make sense that it go straight to Emilia. The Petition to Determine Entitlement to Distribution of Beneficiary's Lapsed Share is under submission. The Court will revise the proposed order.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
